hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify wallet and transaction risk data from diverse KYT providers into structured cases and audit-ready decisions for on-chain risk management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to combine multiple KYT and transaction risk scores into a unified, audit-ready view. This separation slows decision-making and makes it difficult to trace risk exposure across wallets, transactions, and counterparties.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multiple KYT and transaction risk provider outputs with wallet, transaction and counterparty data into one unified compliance workflow for clearer triage, decision-making and audit evidence.
workflow_title: From transaction risks to review decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk scores, routes alerts into structured reviews, records decisions and preserves evidence for audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented wallet and transaction risk scores into connected cases, decisions and audit evidence, enabling clearer control for VASP compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by unifying transaction risk data into auditable decisions, preserving evidence and enabling bank due diligence within secure enterprise deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY aggregate transaction risk scores for review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY consolidates wallet and transaction risks
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports transaction risk decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for multi-source KYT risk inputs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for transaction risk scoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects multiple KYT providers to aggregate wallet and transaction risk scores into one connected compliance workflow for more efficient review and decision-making.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY aggregate KYT provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and combines fragmented KYT alerts and risk signals into structured cases, linking wallets, transactions and counterparties for thorough investigation and follow-up.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and transparent review of transaction risk and compliance decisions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY offers provider-neutral integration that fits above existing KYC, KYT, screening and Travel Rule tools, connecting their outputs into one scalable operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT or providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying KYT or analytics providers but structures their outputs into workflow, evidence and reports for clearer compliance control.
final_title: Connect transaction risk into reviewable cases
final_description: See how SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risks into structured workflows supporting audit-ready decisions and compliance reviews.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
